targets.expr: histogram_quantile($percentile, sum by (namespace, job, node, ordering_stage) (rate(daml_sequencer_bftordering_performance_ordering_stage_latency_duration_seconds{namespace=~"$namespace",job=~"$job",node=~"$node",ordering_stage=~"batch-availability-total"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Total batch dissemination and consensus time (permanence in availability module)

panels.description: Rate of blocks ordered and output to the read path.
panels.title: Throughput - blocks/s

panels.description: Rate of batches (proofs of availability) ordered and output to the read path.
panels.title: Throughput - batches/s

panels.description: Latency between sending a message and receiving it on the other side

targets.expr: histogram_quantile($percentile, sum by (namespace, job, node, source_sequencer) (rate(daml_sequencer_bftordering_p2p_send_grpc_latency_duration_seconds{namespace=~"$namespace",job=~"$job",node=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: P2P gRPC network latency

panels.description: Time waited for a batch while there are outstanding consensus proposal requests and no dissemination is in progress
panels.title: Time spent waiting for batches

panels.description: Cumulative latency of a batch dissemination until a PoA is formed and it can be present multiple times for a given batch if it regresses due to topology changes
panels.title: Total dissemination time

panels.description: Insertion in proposal queue until next event, like re-sign, re-dissemination, [re-]proposal or batch ordered (emitted 1 or more times per batch)
panels.title: Time waited for batch inclusion in consensus proposal

panels.description: Rate of regressions of a single batch due to topology changes
panels.title: Batch dissemination regressions rate

panels.description: Insertion in batch queue until extraction and batch send to availability
panels.title: Request batch inclusion latency

panels.description: Summary of cache hits, misses, and evictions for the Availability store's batch data cache

targets.expr: sum by (namespace, job, node) (irate(daml_cache_hits{namespace=~"$namespace", job=~"$job", node=~"$node", cache="batch-cache"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (namespace, job, node) (irate(daml_cache_misses{namespace=~"$namespace", job=~"$job", node=~"$node", cache="batch-cache"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (namespace, job, node) (irate(daml_cache_evictions{namespace=~"$namespace", job=~"$job", node=~"$node", cache="batch-cache"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Availability Store Cache Statistics

panels.description: Block commit time at the consensus (PBFT) level.

panels.description: Time elapsed between sending a PrePrepare and seeing that the block has been ordered
panels.title: Consensus segment block proposal to commit latency

panels.description: Time elapsed between ordered blocks proposed by a segment
panels.title: Consensus segment block ordering latency

panels.description: Time between a proposal request to the availability module needed to continue a segment and a PrePrepare being built
panels.title: Wait for proposal

panels.description: Time between the epoch completion and the start of the next epoch
panels.title: Wait for epoch start

panels.description: Time between the last led segment's completion and the epoch completion
panels.title: Wait for epoch completion
Postponed view messages queue max size

panels.description: Time to transfer a given epoch from peer(s)
panels.title: Epoch Transfer Duration
Postponed consensus messages queue max size
Retransmission responses discarded due to wrong epoch - rate
Retransmission requests discarded due to rate limiting - rate

panels.description: Time needed to inspect requests within a block
panels.title: Block inspection
Save blacklist leader selection policy state

panels.description: Time to compute the pruning point, based on retention factors and current time
panels.title: Compute pruning point

panels.description: Time to evict unordered, but expired, batches in the availability DB

panels.description: Time to create new table partitions, when necessary
panels.title: Create partitions

panels.description: Time to drop table partitions that can be pruned
